productName: Legit Gold Infused Pre-roll High Octane Haze - 1g
description: Ready-to-spark sativa infused pre-roll of High Octane Haze, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a sweet, spicy-citrus aroma with a bright, energetic, cerebral feel, delivering an upbeat, talkative energy. Pace yourself.
